description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a prominent hip roof and a mix of light-colored exterior walls and large glass windows. The structure includes a main building and an attached rectangular extension, possibly a garage or guest suite, with a flat roof. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped with several mature trees and shrubs, providing privacy and greenery. A small rectangular swimming pool is visible adjacent to the house, enhancing the outdoor living space. The windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical groupings, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entryway is understated, with a simple path leading to the front door and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, single-story house with a hip roof, large windows, an attached extension, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, hip roof, large windows, and the attached extension with a flat roof on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extension with a flat roof, chimney, and dense landscaping on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, symmetrical window arrangement, and the pool directly behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extension, chimney, and additional landscaping, with the pool visible on the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels and grouped windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat path, minimal overhang, and no prominent decorative elements
